overview.description: The JPMorgan BetaBuilders U.S. Aggregate Bond ETF (BBAG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks a market-cap weighted index to provide exposure to investment grade, USD-denominated debt securities from government and corporate issuers. The fund may invest in securities of any maturity. BBAG was launched on Dec 12, 2018 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.
infoTable: Bloomberg U.S. Aggregate Bond Index (Benchmark TR Gross)
